modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Headphone jack on Lenovo laptop is not working

full_description_text: Mi laptop no tiene sonido en el jack de los audífonos. Yo intento usarlo, pero no funciona. No sé por qué no está funcionando, pero no puedo escuchar nada.
short_description: Headphone jack on Lenovo laptop is not working
description: Mi laptop no tiene sonido en el jack de los audífonos. Yo intento usarlo, pero no funciona. No sé por qué no está funcionando, pero no puedo escuchar nada.
